stemHtml: How many satellites are required for GBAS to function correctly?

options.a: 4 satellites are required for GBAS operations.
options.b: GBAS uses the signals from at least 3 geostationary satellites.
options.c: GBAS requires at least 5 satellites to detect and exclude the possible faulty satellite.
options.d: GBAS uses the exact same satellites as the receiver in the aircraft.
